prompt:
A portable solar kit laid out on the ground: a folding solar panel connected via MC4 leads to a compact charge controller and a small LiFePO4 battery pack in a weather-resistant case. Ring terminals, strain relief, and neatly routed cables are clearly visible, showing a ready-to-deploy off-grid wiring setup.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future renewable-energy aesthetic: soft natural lighting, realistic materials, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Compose so the panel, controller, and battery pack form a clear, uncluttered icon-like arrangement.
